base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of overworld_map_alefgard_explored_variant — a tile (overworld_map) from 1986 dragon quest. Second rendering of Alefgard — visible 'explored' or 'minimap' version with markers. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Second rendering of Alefgard — visible 'explored' or 'minimap' version with markers; may indicate player-facing map overlay vs raw tile map
